title: artemisia arctica subsp. comata
intro: Artemisia arctica subsp. comata, commonly known as silver sage or prairie sage, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Artemisia arctica subsp. comata include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and soothe respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
